response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB — plus current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) at re:cinq, which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated breadth across backend, frontend, DevOps, and multiple languages (Java, TypeScript, DLang, C++), with a clear craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, pairing).
strengths: Direct stack match: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB with 6+ years
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience aligns with required AI skills
Polyglot background (Java, TypeScript, DLang, C++) and strong DevOps/Docker/K8s exposure
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Limited evidence of PostgreSQL or major cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) depth beyond AWS CDK mention
Remote location (Lagos) may complicate Berlin-centric collaboration
